mapper.select: select id, type, name from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from apartment_label where apartment_id = #{apartmentId} and is_deleted = 0)
select id, type, name from label_info where is_deleted = 0 and id in (select label_id from room_label where room_id = #{roomId} and is_deleted = 0)
